headline: Does Jacobs Solutions (J) Have the Potential to Rally 26.32% as Wall Street Analysts Expect?
summary: The average of price targets set by Wall Street analysts indicates a potential upside of 26.3% in Jacobs Solutions (J). While the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric is questionable, the positive trend in earnings estimate revisions might translate into an upside in the stock.
